name: The Astrean Realms
description:
You find yourself in a fantastical world at the center of all creation. The world is high fantasy while having a few areas of modern cities. Divided into three rings, you are able to choose where to start and how your story in this world will progress.

Become part of the Noble hierarchy in this Higher realms, surrounded by wealth and a name that's influential across all three realms.

Become an Adventurer in the Middle realms, moving between continent to continent, finding wonders from the deepest of trenches to the highest of mountain peaks and the wonders of futuristic cities.

Or become a Citizen of a quaint and peaceful town in the lower realms, living out a peaceful life, exploring the vast fields for any wonders that may be hidden beneath the plain grass.
creator: RainAstrea
